mapper.sql: user_id, username, password, nickname, avatar, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT FROM sys_user
del_flag = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{user.username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{user.nickname}, '%')
AND status = #{user.status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET del_flag = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = 0
